name: Apple Spice Muffins
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F. Prepare 12 muffin pans with cooking spray and flour.
In a mixing bowl, combine flour, oats, baking powder, cinnamon, nutmeg, cloves, salt, and raisins.
In another mixing bowl, combine apples, milk, brown sugar, applesauce, and egg white.
Mix wet ingredients with dry ingredients just until moistened. Use an ice cream scoop to fill muffin tins 2/3 full.
Bake for 20 to 30 minutes, or until lightly browned.
